message:
refactor(tests): standardize DirGuard pattern and clean up imports

- agents.rs, where.rs: add DirGuard RAII struct + TEST_DIR_LOCK for
  test directory management
- info.rs: use temp.path() instead of &temp, move CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION
  import to storage::schema, remove unused imports
- close.rs: remove unused env and PathBuf imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
